title: maclura regia
intro: Maclura regia, also known as the Osage orange, is a deciduous tree native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Maclura regia include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder for herbal use, and is also used in folk remedies for its antiparasitic and antiviral properties.
